title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Reiju, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The germa are a nation that has nowhere to call home.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We have no land to rule over,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But still we are even allowed to partici- rate in the reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, do you think you could show me your panties?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did he eat an armored stonefish from the hot-hot sea?

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: This poison's mechanism of action is unique...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can tell this one is a bit of a glutton. There's enough token here to kill a giant."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What should we do?! I'm a failure of a doctor! Waaagh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: do not fret. He is in luck.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: It just so happens that this poison...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thank you for the meal. Do

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you try to suck out that much poison, you'll be the one that ends up dying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaaah! Not fair! I want a smooth too! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The rash is... being transferred to her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you just suck out all the poison? Are you okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luuuff Fff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ffyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! I was eating the fish, and then... I must'a fallen asleep huh? Aw man, that fish's skin was so good, too! Do we have any left?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, you're right. Who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What?! Thank you! Who is she, though?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
